description: EFB & Flight Planning Companion — governance layer for Electronic Flight Bag data with ForeFlight integration

hard_stops.label: EFB Authorization Expired
hard_stops.logic: Operator's EFB Operations Specification has lapsed — EFB use not authorized

hard_stops.label: Chart Database Expired
hard_stops.logic: Navigation data is out of the current AIRAC cycle — charts are not current

soft_flags.label: W&B Profile Mismatch
soft_flags.logic: EFB weight and balance profile does not match AV-015 calculated values

soft_flags.label: Checklist Version Outdated
soft_flags.logic: Checklist version in EFB does not match current approved revision

soft_flags.label: New Approach Procedure Available
soft_flags.logic: A new or amended instrument approach procedure is available for a frequently used airport
